function: () => { try { const cardContainer = document.querySelector('.app-container[data-card-order-key]'); if (typeof Sortable === 'undefined') return 'Sortable not loaded'; if (!cardContainer) return 'no container'; if (cardContainer.__sortableCardInstance) return 'already wired'; const inst = Sortable.create(cardContainer, { animation: 160, draggable: '[data-card-id]', filter: '.sort-guide, .app-header, .app-menu, .app-footer, script, style', preventOnFilter: true }); cardContainer.__sortableCardInstance = inst; return 'wired: ' + (inst ? 'yes' : 'no'); } catch (e) { return 'err: ' + e.message + '\n' + e.stack; } }
